languages.text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

languages.text: 「バトシュスキー大佐、ここにザルコフの城代総督に任命する」
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Castellan-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「バトシュスキー大佐、ここにザルコフの城代総督に任命する。」

languages.text: « Colonel Batoshski, je vous nomme colonel-gouverneur de Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: « Colonel Batoshski, je vous nomme colonel-gouverneur de Zarkov. »

languages.text: "Albay Batoshski, işbu belgeyle Zarkov'un Vali Albayı olarak atanmış bulunuyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Albay Batoshski, işbu belgeyle Zarkov'un Vali Albayı olarak atanmış bulunuyorsun."

languages.text: "Colonel Batoshski, hiermit ernenne ich Euch zum Colonel-Gouverneur von Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Colonel Batoshski, hiermit ernenne ich Euch zum Colonel-Gouverneur von Zarkov."

languages.text: «Coronel Batoshski, por la presente le nombro coronel gobernador de Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: «Coronel Batoshski, por la presente le nombro coronel gobernador de Zarkov».

languages.text: “巴托什斯基上校，我现在正式任命你为扎尔科夫的总督上校。”
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, you are hereby appointed the Colonel-Governor of Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: “巴托什斯基上校，我现在正式任命你为扎尔科夫的总督上校。”
